## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between SmithAI and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and AI receptionist trends.](https://fathom.video/share/kpXTds9q-o2qeiSdTyemgGkxQcHVvzkP?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New content OS in Airtable established with 6 core content clusters, focusing on call flow design](https://fathom.video/share/kpXTds9q-o2qeiSdTyemgGkxQcHVvzkP?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Virtual receptionist searches down 80% (500 to 110) from Jan-May to Jun-Oct, shifting to AI receptionist searches](https://fathom.video/share/kpXTds9q-o2qeiSdTyemgGkxQcHVvzkP?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
  - [Legal industry (esp. multi-location firms) identified as key target for VR content due to slower AI adoption](https://fathom.video/share/kpXTds9q-o2qeiSdTyemgGkxQcHVvzkP?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)
  - [Q3 website performance strong: 80-85% engagement rate, homepage driving most conversions](https://fathom.video/share/kpXTds9q-o2qeiSdTyemgGkxQcHVvzkP?tab=summary&timestamp=1563.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy for AI Receptionist Knowledge Hub

  - [6 core content clusters established in Airtable, aligned with mock-up design](https://fathom.video/share/kpXTds9q-o2qeiSdTyemgGkxQcHVvzkP?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Call flow design cluster currently in focus](https://fathom.video/share/kpXTds9q-o2qeiSdTyemgGkxQcHVvzkP?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
  - [Potential for 3,000-5,000+ traffic from identified keywords](https://fathom.video/share/kpXTds9q-o2qeiSdTyemgGkxQcHVvzkP?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)
  - [Low keyword difficulty aligns well with Smith.ai's domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/kpXTds9q-o2qeiSdTyemgGkxQcHVvzkP?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)

### Virtual Receptionist (VR) Content Opportunity

  - [VR searches down 80% in past 6 months, shifting to AI receptionist](https://fathom.video/share/kpXTds9q-o2qeiSdTyemgGkxQcHVvzkP?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
  - [Opportunity to capture less competitive VR space:](https://fathom.video/share/kpXTds9q-o2qeiSdTyemgGkxQcHVvzkP?tab=summary&timestamp=621.0)
      - [Refresh existing VR content](https://fathom.video/share/kpXTds9q-o2qeiSdTyemgGkxQcHVvzkP?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)
      - [Target legal industry (slower AI adopters)](https://fathom.video/share/kpXTds9q-o2qeiSdTyemgGkxQcHVvzkP?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)
      - [Focus on multi-location firms (10-20 support staff)](https://fathom.video/share/kpXTds9q-o2qeiSdTyemgGkxQcHVvzkP?tab=summary&timestamp=995.0)
      - [Key practice areas: personal injury, family law, immigration](https://fathom.video/share/kpXTds9q-o2qeiSdTyemgGkxQcHVvzkP?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)

### Call Flow Design Content Feedback

  - [Need for more context setting in intro (e.g., comparison to IVR)](https://fathom.video/share/kpXTds9q-o2qeiSdTyemgGkxQcHVvzkP?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Suggestion to create custom designs rather than using existing ones](https://fathom.video/share/kpXTds9q-o2qeiSdTyemgGkxQcHVvzkP?tab=summary&timestamp=1448.0)
  - [Positive feedback on reduced self-promotion and improved citations](https://fathom.video/share/kpXTds9q-o2qeiSdTyemgGkxQcHVvzkP?tab=summary&timestamp=1489.0)

### Q3 Website Performance Report

  - [Strong overall session growth and engagement (80-85% rate)](https://fathom.video/share/kpXTds9q-o2qeiSdTyemgGkxQcHVvzkP?tab=summary&timestamp=1563.0)
  - [Homepage driving most conversions for AI and human receptionist services](https://fathom.video/share/kpXTds9q-o2qeiSdTyemgGkxQcHVvzkP?tab=summary&timestamp=1683.0)
  - [AI receptionist clicks up significantly (13,000+ events, Q3 vs Q2)](https://fathom.video/share/kpXTds9q-o2qeiSdTyemgGkxQcHVvzkP?tab=summary&timestamp=1683.0)
  - [Increasing traffic from AI sources (ChatGPT, Copilot, Gemini)](https://fathom.video/share/kpXTds9q-o2qeiSdTyemgGkxQcHVvzkP?tab=summary&timestamp=1798.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Ask ChatGPT to review and potentially revise the 6 content clusters](https://fathom.video/share/kpXTds9q-o2qeiSdTyemgGkxQcHVvzkP?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
  - [Isolate VR prompts in Scrunch to establish baseline for content refresh](https://fathom.video/share/kpXTds9q-o2qeiSdTyemgGkxQcHVvzkP?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
  - [Supply brand guidelines for custom image designs in call flow content](https://fathom.video/share/kpXTds9q-o2qeiSdTyemgGkxQcHVvzkP?tab=summary&timestamp=1197.0)
  - [Update call flow design content intro with more context (IVR comparison)](https://fathom.video/share/kpXTds9q-o2qeiSdTyemgGkxQcHVvzkP?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Create report comparing LLM traffic bucket vs organic search traffic](https://fathom.video/share/kpXTds9q-o2qeiSdTyemgGkxQcHVvzkP?tab=summary&timestamp=1822.0)
  - [Proceed with both pillar content development and VR content refresh simultaneously](https://fathom.video/share/kpXTds9q-o2qeiSdTyemgGkxQcHVvzkP?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)
